# Paras Verma — Portfolio

This is the portfolio of Paras Verma, a software engineer and AI engineer based in India (IST).

## Summary
- Builds interactive web applications with clean UI.
- Primary stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL.
- Availability: Available for freelance.

## Current Experience
- SDE Intern at Jspark AI (Nov 2025 - Present)
- Company: https://jspark.ai

## Skills
Next.js, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Prisma ORM, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Docker, Redux, Postman, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Git, GitHub

## Featured Projects
- Review Scope: Automated code reviews that go beyond the diff. Catch bugs and enforce standards with an AI that understands your entire repository context.
  - Live: https://reviewscope.luffytaro.me
  - Source: https://github.com/Review-scope/ReviewScope
- CalMarshal: Streamlined event scheduling platform featuring seamless Google Calendar integration and real-time availability tracking.
  - Live: https://cal-marshal-phi.vercel.app
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/CalMarshal
- Dionysus: Executive AI assistant that automates meeting notes, performs deep code analysis, and enhances developer productivity using LLMs.
  - Live: https://dionysus-zeta.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/Dionysus
- Bolt New: Advanced prompt-to-app generator that transforms natural language into production-ready React applications with instant previews.
  - Live: https://bolt-new-olive.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/bolt.new
- DriveDeck: Dynamic automotive marketplace platform designed for high-performance car trading with integrated management tools.
  - Live: https://drive-deck.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/DriveDeck
- Chat App: Real-time communication platform powered by WebSockets, featuring instant messaging and low-latency data synchronization.
  - Live: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/chat-app
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/chat-app
- Paytm: Comprehensive fintech solution for digital payments, enabling secure peer-to-peer transfers and robust account management.
  - Live: https://paytm-livid.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/Paytm
- Medium: Full-featured blogging platform with markdown support, content discovery, and a rich reading experience — built with Hono and Prisma.
  - Live: https://medium-kappa-nine.vercel.app/
  - Source: https://github.com/paras-verma7454/Medium
